text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has arrived for the autumn Tenno Sho,
where Maruzensky will compete with Special
Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The highly anticipated bout has finally arrived!
Maruzensky heads to the track, knowing she is
about to have an exhilarating race.
